ocr_findings.description: The SQL database operation flow diagram (app → RDBMS → 関係データベース with labeled arrows ①②③) is replaced by an image placeholder 'img-0.jpeg'. Diagram text content is not captured in OCR, but it is a visual diagram rather than prose text.

reviewer_notes: Page covers RDBMS/NoSQL distinction, SQL definition, and DBMS three functions. All prose paragraphs and the three-item numbered list are correctly captured. The flow diagram is represented as an image placeholder — arrow labels (①SQL命令, ②データ操作する, ③結果を返す) are not transcribed but this is a diagram-only loss, low severity.
